name: VIP Lounge Access
description: Exclusive access to the VIP lounge with premium seating, dedicated bar service, and private restrooms.

name: Parking Pass
description: Reserved parking spot in the venue's official parking facility, closest to the entrance.

name: Meet & Greet
description: Exclusive backstage meet and greet with the performer. Includes a photo opportunity and signed memorabilia.

name: Cheeseburger
description: Classic venue cheeseburger with lettuce, tomato, and house sauce. Served with fries.

name: Cheese Platter
description: Assorted artisan cheeses served with crackers, grapes, and honey.

name: Chicken Wrap
description: Grilled chicken wrap with fresh vegetables and house dressing.

name: Fresh Fruit Bowl
description: Seasonal fresh fruit bowl with a side of yogurt dip.

name: Cookie Pack
description: Pack of 4 freshly baked assorted cookies.

name: Coffee
description: Freshly brewed hot coffee. Choice of black, with milk, or with sugar.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Premium sparkling mineral water, served chilled.

name: Red Wine
description: House red wine by the glass. Full-bodied with hints of cherry and oak.

name: Beer
description: Ice-cold draft beer. Choice of lager or ale.

name: Whiskey
description: Premium blended Scotch whisky served neat or on the rocks.
included_items: Choice of neat or on the rocks

name: Event T-Shirt
description: Official event T-shirt with exclusive event artwork. Available in S, M, L, XL.

name: Poster
description: Limited edition A2 event poster, suitable for framing.

name: Tote Bag
description: Canvas tote bag with official event branding. Eco-friendly and reusable.

name: Event Insurance
description: Comprehensive event protection covering cancellations, postponements, and weather disruptions. Full ticket refund guaranteed.
